name: Five-Alarm Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 - Dottie Cross TMPJ72B 1 x chili peppers
1/2 c Finely chopped white or yellow onion
1 - Seeded and minced, or 1/2 c chopped canned green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring all the ingredients to a simmer over medium-low heat.
2. Cook for 5 minutes until heated through.
3. Spoon the salsa into hot, sterilized jars and attach the lids.
4. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from the water and cool at room temperature.
Note: The canned chili peppers will make a milder salsa than if you use fresh chiles. After opening, you can extend the salsa (and mute the heat a little) by stirring in a cupful of minced bell peppers or thawed corn kernels. A tablespoon or so of chopped coriander leaves adds a nice fillip. Makes about 2 pints.
